title: [Epic] Client Dashboard UX Unification & Responsive Design
body: Unify the isolated client dashboard pages (`inspector.html` and `logs.html`) into a single, cohesive, and responsive Single Page Application (SPA). Implement a master navigation menu, user-configurable layout (top vs sidebar), and mobile-friendly interactions (e.g., slide-over inspector details).

issues.title: Merge Client UI into Single SPA
issues.body: Combine `inspector.html` and `logs.html` into a new `dashboard.html`. Update the Go backend (`inspector.go`) to serve this unified SPA across the `/`, `/settings`, and `/logs` endpoints.

issues.title: Implement Master Navigation & Layout Configuration
issues.body: Create a shared master navigation menu linking Inspector, Settings, and Logs. Add a new setting to allow users to toggle between a top navigation bar (default) and a left sidebar.

issues.title: Mobile Responsive Design & Slide-Over Inspector
issues.body: Add responsive CSS media queries. Implement a mobile-friendly slide-over screen for Inspector traffic details.
